meta.source: Hana-san directive: refine pr-split, VTerm terminal multiplexer, deep integration tests, fix all 19 issues from scratch/issues.md, expand scope towards true perfection.
meta.maintenance: Update incrementally after every sub-task. Deviations logged within the plan.
meta.sequenceRule: T052 (integration test target) is always the first not-started task. All tasks are sequential and mandatory.

globalAlerts: ALL checks must pass: make (build + lint + test). No exceptions.
Platform compat: Linux, macOS, Windows. Tests use t.TempDir(), t.Setenv().
Integration test config via TestMain flags, project.mk targets with ?= variables.
No estimates, no priorities — 100% completion required.
Auto-split TUI must not hang. Cancellation must propagate immediately.
VTerm must handle arbitrary PTY output without panic, OOM, or mojibake.
mandatoryDirectives: Read blueprint.json and WIP.md at session start.
Update blueprint.json status after every sub-task.
Checkpoint WIP.md after every string of changes.
Rule of Two: 2 contiguous issue-free review cycles before commit.

statusSection.goalState: osm pr-split with a production-grade terminal multiplexer: VTerm correctly handles UTF-8 (stateful decoding, wide chars), all ANSI escape sequences (CSI, OSC with ST, DCS, SGR truecolor/256, DECSET/DECRST all modes), concurrent access is fully synchronized, PTY goroutine lifecycle is leak-free, background reader prevents child starvation, toggle restores screen perfectly including status bar and cursor visibility, erase operations preserve rendition, and the entire pipeline is covered by unit tests, fuzz tests, property-based tests, benchmarks, and architecture documentation.
statusSection.currentState: Session started 2026-02-27 09:18. T051 (make passes) is Done. Deep architectural planning phase complete. Blueprint refined with 27 tasks (T052-T078). Executing T052 next.
replanLog: Prior replans: T006-T009 already implemented; T021-T028 hot-fixes; T029-T042 EAGAIN/MCP/Enter blockers; T038-T053 complete rewrite; T054-T072 all 19 issues.

2026-02-27 REPLAN: Exhaustive blueprint refinement. Pruned all completed tasks before T051. Refined all descriptions with file/function references. Removed all priority/estimate fields. Added T072(fuzz), T073(UTF8 roundtrip), T074(benchmarks), T075(tab stops), T076(DCS), T077(architecture docs), T078(final verification).

sequentialTasks.task: Run full make (build + lint + test) — baseline verification
sequentialTasks.description: Previous session verified all changes compile, lint cleanly, and all tests pass.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: `make` completes with zero errors.

sequentialTasks.task: Update project.mk integration-test-prsplit target to include MCP-only tests
sequentialTasks.description: In project.mk, the existing integration-test-prsplit target runs AI-requiring tests. Add a new integration-test-prsplit-mcp target that runs MCP-only integration tests (TestIntegration_MCPInstanceSession) that don't require a real AI agent. Both targets must use ?= for configurable variables (CLAUDE_COMMAND, INTEGRATION_MODEL, etc.) and respect config.mk overrides. Verify the -run regex on integration-test-prsplit matches TestIntegration_ClaudeSpawnSwitch and TestIntegration_RealClaude_ClassificationE2E.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: `make integration-test-prsplit` runs all AI-requiring pr-split integration tests with output showing matched test names. `make integration-test-prsplit-mcp` runs MCP-only tests independently. Both targets appear in `make help` output. Both targets respect config.mk variable overrides.

sequentialTasks.task: Implement stateful UTF-8 decoding in VTerm.Write() with carry buffer and wide character support
sequentialTasks.description: VTerm.Write() iterates `for _, b := range p` and calls processByte(b), which treats each byte of a multi-byte UTF-8 character as a separate rune via `v.putChar(rune(b))`, corrupting cursor positioning and producing mojibake. Fix: (1) Add utf8Buf [4]byte and utf8Len int fields to VTerm. (2) In Write(), when state==stateGround and byte >= 0x80, accumulate bytes in utf8Buf. Use utf8.FullRune to detect complete runes. When complete, call utf8.DecodeRune and pass to putChar(). Invalid sequences produce U+FFFD. (3) Handle carry across Write() calls. (4) For wide characters (CJK, emoji), use runewidth to determine display width. putChar() must advance curCol by the rune's display width, and for width-2 chars, fill the next cell with a zero-width placeholder. (5) Update Render() to skip zero-width placeholder cells.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Writing []byte("\u1f916") produces 1 rune with curCol advancing by 2. Writing []byte("cafe\u0301") produces correct display with e-acute as single rune. A Write() splitting a multi-byte char across two calls correctly reassembles. Render() outputs valid UTF-8. No mojibake.

sequentialTasks.task: Fix OSC String Terminator: processOSC must transition to stateEscape on ESC, not stateGround
sequentialTasks.description: In processOSC(), the `b == 0x1b` branch sets v.state = stateGround. This is wrong — OSC ST termination is ESC followed by backslash (0x5C). By going to stateGround, the backslash is treated as printable. Fix: Change to v.state = stateEscape. In processEscape(), consume the backslash as ST and return to stateGround. Either use a flag (e.g., oscEscPending) or a stateOSC_ESC sub-state.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Writing \x1b]0;My Title\x1b\\ produces no visible characters. BEL terminator still works. OSC 52/8/iTerm2 sequences with ST are correctly consumed.

sequentialTasks.task: Fix SGR parameter bleed on truncated truecolor sequences
sequentialTasks.description: In handleSGR(), the truecolor case (p==38, sub-case 2) checks i+3 < len(params). If check fails (truncated like \x1b[38;2;1m), i is NOT incremented, and trailing parameter 1 is evaluated as SGR bold. Fix: When i+3 >= len(params) in both fg and bg truecolor branches, fast-forward i to len(params). Apply same for 256-color (case 5).
sequentialTasks.acceptance: \x1b[38;2;1m does NOT activate bold. \x1b[48;2;255;128mHello does NOT apply partial color. Valid truecolor still works. Valid 256-color still works.

sequentialTasks.task: Cap paramBuf length to prevent unbounded memory growth in CSI/OSC parsing
sequentialTasks.description: In processCSI(), v.paramBuf = append(v.paramBuf, b) grows without limit for malformed sequences. Fix: Add maxParamBufLen = 256 constant. Before appending, check length; if exceeded, reset state to stateGround and clear paramBuf. Apply same cap to intermBuf.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: 1000 bytes of parameter chars without CSI terminator does NOT grow paramBuf past 256. Malformed sequence dropped. Normal CSI unaffected.

sequentialTasks.task: Fix ESC handling in processCSI to transition to stateEscape instead of stateGround
sequentialTasks.description: In processCSI(), default case sets v.state = stateGround for unrecognized bytes. ESC (0x1B) hits default, aborting CSI and going to ground. Fix: Add explicit check for b == 0x1b before default. Set v.state = stateEscape, clear paramBuf/intermBuf.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Input \x1b[3\x1b[1mX results in 'X' with bold attribute. Aborted \x1b[3 discarded. \x1b[1m parsed as SGR bold.

sequentialTasks.task: Redesign PTY read goroutine lifecycle to prevent leaks and concurrent read contention
sequentialTasks.description: RunPassthrough spawns a goroutine with child.Read(buf) that blocks on a syscall ignoring context cancellation. On toggle-out, the goroutine persists. Next toggle-in spawns a second goroutine competing for the same fd. Fix: Implement permanent background reader goroutine. Add readerStop/readerDone channels. Attach() starts background goroutine: read child → VTerm, forward to stdout only when passthroughActive. Detach() closes readerStop, waits readerDone. RunPassthrough removes Goroutine 2, keeps only stdin→child.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: 10 toggle cycles do not accumulate goroutines. NumGoroutine() after detach returns to baseline. Output never fragmented. Race detector clean.

sequentialTasks.task: Add sync.Mutex to VTerm to prevent data races between Write(), Render(), and Resize()
sequentialTasks.description: VTerm has zero internal synchronization. Resize() reallocates sb.cells while Write() and Render() access them concurrently (background reader writes, main thread renders/resizes). Fix: Add sync.Mutex to VTerm. Lock in Write(), Render(), Resize(). Method-level granularity, no I/O under lock.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: go test -race passes. Concurrent Resize()+Write()+Render() stress test (10k iterations) no panic. No index out of range.

sequentialTasks.task: Document and test BubbleTea async race with manual alt-screen management
sequentialTasks.description: pr_split.go synchronously exits alt-screen before RunPassthrough. BubbleTea's ReleaseTerminal() is async. Risk: delayed RestoreTerminal during passthrough corrupts state. Fix: Add sync mechanism, stress test 20 rapid toggles, code comment documenting timing contract.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: 20-cycle rapid toggle shows no terminal corruption. Toggle key interception functional. BubbleTea TUI resumes correctly after every toggle-back.

sequentialTasks.task: Validate background PTY reader prevents child process starvation in SideOsm
sequentialTasks.description: When mux is in SideOsm, nothing reads from m.child, causing pipe buffer fill and child block. T058's background reader must prevent this. Test: attach child writing 1MB, keep in SideOsm, toggle to SideClaude — VTerm has full output.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Child writing 1MB in SideOsm does NOT block. After toggle, Render() shows tail of output. Child exit not delayed by pipe pressure.

sequentialTasks.task: Fix erase/scroll operations to fill blank cells with current rendition instead of default
sequentialTasks.description: Erase/scroll ops create blank cells with default attrs instead of current SGR rendition (ECMA-48 violation). Affected: eraseDisplay, eraseLine, eraseChars, deleteChars, insertChars, scrollRegionUp/Down, insertLines, deleteLines. Fix: Add makeAttrLine helper. Replace cell{ch: ' '} with cell{ch: ' ', attr: sb.curAttr} in erase contexts. Replace makeLine() in scroll contexts with makeAttrLine(v.cols, sb.curAttr).
sequentialTasks.acceptance: After \x1b[44m + \x1b[2J, all cells have bg=blue. After scroll-up with blue bg, new lines have bg=blue. After \x1b[0m\x1b[2J, default attrs. Render() emits SGR for colored blank regions.

sequentialTasks.task: Re-render status bar after VTerm Render() on toggle-back
sequentialTasks.description: RunPassthrough 'not first swap' branch writes vt.Render() but status bar bytes are NOT in childVterm. After clear+render, status bar disappears. Fix: After vt.Render() in 'not first swap', call renderStatusBar(h) if statusEnabled.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Toggle to Claude → see status bar → toggle osm → toggle back: status bar visible. 5 repeats: status bar persists every toggle-back.

sequentialTasks.task: Synchronize VTerm scroll region with real terminal when status bar enabled
sequentialTasks.description: Status bar sets real terminal scroll region to 1..h-1, but VTerm default is full-screen. Scrolling diverges. Fix: Size childVterm to rows=h-1 when status bar enabled. Paint status bar separately.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: With status bar: child writes 100 lines, toggle out/back, VTerm matches bottom h-1 rows. Status bar not in scrollable content. No off-by-one.

sequentialTasks.task: Track and restore cursor visibility (DECTCEM) in VTerm Render()
sequentialTasks.description: DECSET/DECRST 25 are no-ops. If child hides cursor, toggle-back shows it because Render() doesn't emit visibility. Fix: Add cursorVisible bool to screenBuffer. Handle DECSET/DECRST 25. Render() emits visibility state. Save/restore in DECSC/DECRC.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: After \x1b[?25l, Render() contains \x1b[?25l. After \x1b[?25h, contains \x1b[?25h. Apps hiding cursor display correctly on toggle-back.

sequentialTasks.task: Optimize VTerm Render() to skip unchanged/empty trailing content
sequentialTasks.description: Render() generates CUP + row for every row including empty ones. For 200-row terminal with 20 lines, 180 unnecessary sequences. Fix: Skip entirely-default rows. Trim trailing default cells in non-empty rows.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Render() for 200x80 with 'Hello' on row 0 significantly smaller. Benchmark ≥50% reduction for sparse. Dense screens no regression.

sequentialTasks.task: Reset swappedOnce to false in TUIMux.Detach()
sequentialTasks.description: swappedOnce set true in RunPassthrough, never reset. New child after detach skips screen clear and SIGWINCH. Fix: Add m.swappedOnce = false in Detach().
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Attach A → toggle → Detach A → Attach B → toggle: firstSwap true, SIGWINCH sent. Test asserts resizeFn called each first-toggle-after-attach.

sequentialTasks.task: Fix DECSET 1049 cursor save/restore based on active screen
sequentialTasks.description: handleDECSET 1049 always saves to v.primary regardless of active screen. Fix: DECSET 1049 on primary → save cursor, switch to alternate, clear. On alternate → no-op or save alternate. DECRST 1049 → switch to primary, restore. Guard double-set/reset.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Text at (5,10) → DECSET 1049 → text at (2,3) → DECRST 1049 → cursor at (5,10). Double-set → DECRST → correct restore. No panic.

sequentialTasks.task: Add alt-screen mode variant support for ?47 and ?1047
sequentialTasks.description: Only 1049 implemented. ?47 switches without cursor save/clear. ?1047 switches + clears, no cursor save. Fix: Add cases 47 and 1047 to handleDECSET/handleDECRST with correct semantics.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: DECSET ?47 switches without clearing/saving. DECRST ?47 switches back without restoring. DECSET ?1047 switches and clears. Combined works.

sequentialTasks.task: Clamp savedRow/savedCol on resize to prevent index-out-of-bounds panic
sequentialTasks.description: resize() clamps curRow/curCol but NOT savedRow/savedCol. Cursor restore after resize to smaller terminal causes panic. Fix: Clamp savedRow/savedCol in resize(). Also clamp in DECRC and DECRST 1049 as defense-in-depth.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Cursor at (40,100), DECSC, resize 24×80, DECRC → (23,79), no panic. DECSET 1049 at (40,100), resize, DECRST → clamped, no panic.

sequentialTasks.task: Replace os.Stdout with injected stdout in pr_split.go toggle callback and mux constructor
sequentialTasks.description: Execute() receives stdout but toggle callback uses os.Stdout.WriteString() and mux.New() uses os.Stdout. Fix: Use stdout.Write([]byte(...)) for alt-screen sequences. Change mux.New to use injected stdout.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: No os.Stdout in toggle callback. Integration tests capturing stdout see alt-screen sequences. Existing tests pass.

sequentialTasks.task: Add comprehensive fuzz testing for VTerm ANSI parser
sequentialTasks.description: Create vterm_fuzz_test.go: FuzzVTermWrite (seeds: CSI, OSC, UTF-8, SGR, DECSET, scroll), FuzzVTermResize (interleaved Write+Resize), FuzzVTermRoundtrip (Write→Render→fresh VTerm→compare). All assert no panic.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: go test -fuzz=FuzzVTermWrite -fuzztime=30s passes. FuzzVTermResize 30s no panic. Seed corpus committed. make test runs seeds.

sequentialTasks.task: Add property-based tests for UTF-8 roundtrip in VTerm
sequentialTasks.description: Verify UTF-8 roundtrip: random valid UTF-8 → Write → cell read-back matches runes and positions. Test cross-Write-call boundaries for all multi-byte sequences. Invalid UTF-8 → U+FFFD.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: 1000 random UTF-8 strings round-trip with zero mismatches. Split-boundary passes for all multi-byte. Invalid → U+FFFD.

sequentialTasks.task: Add VTerm and mux benchmarks for performance regression tracking
sequentialTasks.description: Create vterm_bench_test.go: Write_ASCII, Write_UTF8, Render_Sparse, Render_Dense, Render_WithSGR, Resize, MuxPassthrough. Add bench target to project.mk.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: go test -bench=. passes. Write ≥10MB/s ASCII. Render ≤5ms 200×80 dense. bench target in project.mk.

sequentialTasks.task: Add tab stop handling (HTS, TBC, CHT, CBT) to VTerm
sequentialTasks.description: Tab uses fixed 8-column. Implement: tabStops []bool (default 8-col). ESC H (HTS). CSI g (TBC). CSI I (CHT). CSI Z (CBT). On resize extend/truncate.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Default tabs at 0,8,16,24. HTS at 5 → tab from 0 stops at 5. TBC 3g clears all. CHT 2 advances by 2. Resize preserves tabs.

sequentialTasks.task: Add DCS (Device Control String) sequence consumption to VTerm parser
sequentialTasks.description: No DCS handling. ESC P → stateDCS. Consume until ST. Bounded buffer (4KB max).
sequentialTasks.acceptance: DCS consumed without printing. Subsequent text correct. No memory growth from long DCS.

sequentialTasks.task: Write architecture documentation for terminal mux subsystem
sequentialTasks.description: Create docs/reference/mux-architecture.md: goroutine model, state machine, VTerm lifecycle, synchronization, toggle sequence, known limitations. ASCII diagrams. Link from docs/README.md.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Doc exists, linked from README. Developer can understand goroutine model and toggle sequence from doc alone.

sequentialTasks.task: Final full verification: make passes clean on all platforms
sequentialTasks.description: Run make for all T052-T077 changes. Run make-all-in-container for Linux. Verify zero deadcode, zero races, all fuzz seeds pass.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: make passes. make-all-in-container passes. Zero failures. Zero warnings. Zero deadcode.

finalEnforcementProtocol: ALL make targets must pass before any commit.
Rule of Two: 2 contiguous subagent reviews required.
Integration tests must be verified with actual AI execution.
No hanging, no blocking, no screen artifacts in TUI.
VTerm must handle arbitrary byte sequences without panic or OOM.
